title: mentha suaveolens subsp. timija
intro: Mentha suaveolens subsp. timija, also known as Bois de Timija or Indian Oregano, is a subspecies of mint native to the Indian subcontinent. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Mentha suaveolens subsp. timija include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including essential oils, extracts, and infusions, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
